name: Chicken Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 2 large boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 large Campbell's® cream of chicken soup (can, family size)
2 tablespoons onion powder or 1/2 onion, chopped
1/4 cup Parmesan cheese and some for topping
1 box (8 oz) pasta of your choice (penne works well)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the onions and mushrooms until golden brown. Add the chicken pieces and cook until no longer pink.
2. In a large pot, bring water to a boil. Add the chosen pasta and cook until al dente. Drain.
3. In a large bowl, combine the soup, heavy cream, milk, salt, pepper, cooked chicken, and mushroom mixture. Stir in the cooked pasta.
4. Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish (9 x 13 inches works well). Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
5. Bake at 375°F for approximately 20 minutes, or until bubbling and lightly browned.
